name: Senolytics recent review-landscape search

scope.question: Find recent systematic reviews, meta-analyses, trial-landscape reviews, or evidence maps relevant to senolytics and cellular senescence.

search_strategy.rationale: The coverage gap specifically asks whether a recent systematic-review or meta-analysis source can be screened into the senolytics knowledge base.
planned_queries: (senolytics OR senolytic OR senotherapeutic) AND (systematic review OR meta-analysis OR trial-landscape review)

queries.query: (senolytics OR senolytic OR senotherapeutic) AND (systematic review OR meta-analysis OR trial-landscape review)
queries.no_op_reason: Blocked: PubMed/NLM DNS resolution was unavailable in the worker environment, so no authoritative hit list could be retrieved or snapshotted.

blocking_issues: No context pack or source row was supplied for a candidate systematic review or meta-analysis.
PubMed/NLM snapshot retrieval was unavailable from the worker environment, preventing source-snapshot-backed screening.
summary: The review-landscape search could not retrieve authoritative PubMed results in this worker, so no new review source was screened into the knowledge base.
next_actions: Run a network-enabled search/screening pass over PubMed for recent senolytics systematic reviews, meta-analyses, trial reviews, and evidence maps.
Create PubMed source snapshots before upgrading any included review source beyond screened or triage-summary maturity.
